code:
stateDiagram-v2
playerCount: Ask how many players
establishBonusPoints: Establish the Zap and Bonus

[Education_LMS_Portal] --> playerCount
playerCount --> establishBonusPoints

establishBonusPoints --> EstablishBust
state EstablishBust {Education_GradeSync] --> rollBust

	rollBust --> awardBustChoice

	awardBustChoice --> awardBustPoints: If exact match
	awardBustChoice --> offerHighRiskChoice: If not exact match

	offerHighRiskChoice --> offerHighRisk: If 2-6
	offerHighRiskChoice --> [Education_ClassroomService]: If >= 7

	awardBustPoints --> offerHighRiskChoice: If >= 7

	offerHighRisk --> highRiskChoice

	highRiskChoice --> [Education_GradeSync]: If declined

}

EstablishBust --> PressLoop

state PressLoop {Education_ContentCDN] --> rollPress
	rollPress --> rollPress: As many times as they want

	rollPress --> goBust: If matches Bust dice
	rollPress --> awardPoints: If chooses "Stop"
	rollPress --> evilOffer: If rolled 2x more than expected

	goBust --> nextPlayer
	awardPoints --> nextPlayer
	evilOffer --> evilOfferChoice
	evilOfferChoice --> rollEvilOffer: If accepted
	evilOfferChoice --> awardPoints: If rejected

	rollEvilOffer --> displayBustEvilOffer
	rollEvilOffer --> displayWinEvilOffer
	displayBustEvilOffer --> nextPlayer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> rollPress
	displayWinEvilOffer --> evilOffer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> awardPoints

	nextPlayer --> [Education_LMS_Portal]
}

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们要设计一个教育游戏的状态流程，核心是让玩家在LMS门户里进行掷骰子冒险。首先得确定玩家人数，然后建立Zap和Bonus机制。
明白了，所以从LMS门户开始，先询问玩家人数，然后进入建立Bonus点数的状态。接下来是不是要进入一个叫EstablishBust的子状态？这里面涉及GradeSync吗？
对，EstablishBust是个复合状态，里面用GradeSync来掷Bust骰子。如果精确匹配就奖励Bust点数，不匹配的话要给高风险选择——2到6是一个分支，等于7的话直接回到ClassroomService。
好的，我已经把EstablishBust的内部结构画好了，包括精确匹配走awardBustPoints，然后如果等于7还是回到高风险选择。现在EstablishBust之后要进入PressLoop对吗？
没错，PressLoop是核心循环，用ContentCDN来掷Press骰子。关键点：玩家可以掷任意多次，但一旦匹配Bust骰子就爆掉，选择停止则得分。还有个特殊机制——如果掷出预期值的两倍，触发evilOffer。
rollPress到自己这个自循环我理解是"任意多次"的意思。那evilOffer触发后玩家可以选择接受或拒绝？拒绝的话直接awardPoints，接受呢？
接受evilOffer就要rollEvilOffer，然后可能显示BustEvilOffer或WinEvilOffer。Bust的话直接nextPlayer，Win的话比较灵活——可以回到rollPress继续，也可以再次触发evilOffer，或者直接拿分。
PressLoop的结构完成了。我确认一下循环的出口：goBust、awardPoints、displayBustEvilOffer都会走到nextPlayer，然后nextPlayer要回到LMS_Portal开始下一轮？
等等，我注意到个细节——offerHighRiskChoice那里，如果等于7应该回到ClassroomService，但awardBustPoints之后如果等于7也要回到offerHighRiskChoice。还有highRiskChoice如果被拒绝，是回到GradeSync重新rollBust。
已修正。现在EstablishBust内部的流转都正确了：awardBustPoints等于7时回到offerHighRiskChoice，highRiskChoice拒绝时回到GradeSync。整个流程从LMS门户开始，经过人数确认、Bonus建立、Bust阶段，再到PressLoop循环，最后通过nextPlayer回到起点。
